scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,WEB -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:all
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy:web && pnpm run deploy:server
scripts.deploy:server: scp -r apps/server/dist/server.js apps/server/data apps/server/views apps/server/src/assets worsty@zeropi:/home/worsty/app/server/
scripts.deploy:restart: ssh worsty@zeropi 'pkill node || true; pkill serve || true; nohup node /home/worsty/app/server/dist/server.js > server.log 2>&1 & nohup serve -s /home/worsty/app/web -l 3000 > web.log 2>&1 &'
